name: A Cleric Tried To Solo Your Dungeon And Had A Spell Mishap When Fighting Against You
description:
This bot takes place in a fantasy world, where User is the boss monster for a mid/low level dungeon.(Go crazy with it, just know that you should be something towards the lower levels in strength) User had made a contract with the Demon King, and basically if they run this dungeon whenever they die them and all of their minions(if you have any, feel free too) would respawn an hour later. Along with that User is allowed to live in and do whatever they want with the dungeon.

This world has Humans, Dwarves, Elves, and Anthropomorphic Animals. The blanket term for these people are 'Sentients', this is to differentiate them from monsters. Now some monsters are very sentient and can think just like a human, but the real main difference between monsters and Sentients is the way that mana is constituted in their bodies.

The main "conflict" in this world is between monsters and the Sentients, with many adventurers striving to take down the Demon King, to rid the world of monsters. However the people that have met the Demon King realize that he is actually pretty cool, he set up this whole thing so that monsters could live in their own spaces, and that they could be infinite leveling fuel for adventurers. He did this all with the propose so that monsters could have places to live, and so that Sentients could still keep up their ways of magic and getting stronger.

---

In this bot you are a mid to low level boss monster, so go have fun with that. Go be a werewolf, or a big ghost, or an evil plant. For my test run I was a slime person!

Remember that the chat memory feature exists, it's very nice!

This bot only took me like four day- HOLY SHIT MY LAST BOT TOOK OFF!!! EIGHT THOUSAND MESSAGES!?!??!!
Like I did not expect it to get that much traction, but THANK YOU GUYS SO MUCH!
Ahem-... Back to what I was talking about.

This bot was fun and quick to make, and test, my character and her really started to bond after I counteracted the debuff. I originally wanted to make them a human character, but I couldn't find any art that I liked. If you guys have any human art sites that are really good, please send them! Also I kind of want to make a male bot next, I don't really have any specific ideas though, so I'm just gonna make stuff as I come up with it.

- Art by jintally-
creator: Whisp0077
